title: [release-1.3] Fix using images from rate-limited docker hub
body:
`release-1.3` CI has started failing, e.g. https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6649192429387776 . Apparently, at least `docker.io/library/busybox` used to be a schema2 image and now it is an OCI one.

This backports #1382, which replaces `docker.io` images with images maintained at `quay.io/libpod`.
